name: WF-05 | OPEX Detector de Anomalías Multi-capa

parameters.query: SELECT valor FROM opex_config WHERE clave = 'kill_switch' LIMIT 1;

-- DETECTOR 1: Duplicados
-- Mismo contratista + zona + fecha±1d + monto±5%
SELECT
  'A6' AS codigo_alerta, 'alta' AS severidad,
  t1.id AS tx_id,
  t1.contratista_id, t1.contratista_nombre,
  t1.tipo_servicio, t1.zona, t1.ot_id,
  t1.costo_total AS valor_observado,
  t2.id AS tx_duplicado_id,
  t2.costo_total AS valor_esperado,
  0 AS zscore,
  NULL AS delta_pct,
  CONCAT('Posible duplicado con OT ', t2.ot_id, ' del ', t2.fecha_tx, ' monto $', t2.costo_total) AS narrativa_corta
FROM opex_transactions t1
JOIN opex_transactions t2 ON
  t1.contratista_id = t2.contratista_id
  AND t1.id < t2.id
  AND ABS(t1.costo_total - t2.costo_total) / NULLIF(t1.costo_total, 0) <= 0.05
  AND ABS(t1.fecha_tx - t2.fecha_tx) <= 1
  AND (t1.zona = t2.zona OR (t1.zona IS NULL AND t2.zona IS NULL))
WHERE t1.fecha_tx >= CURRENT_DATE - 30
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM opex_alerts a
    WHERE a.tx_id = t1.id AND a.codigo_alerta = 'A6' AND a.estado != 'false_positive'
  )
LIMIT 50;

-- DETECTOR 2: Sin soporte documental > 7 días (A7)
SELECT
  'A7' AS codigo_alerta, 'media' AS severidad,
  t.id AS tx_id,
  t.contratista_id, t.contratista_nombre,
  t.tipo_servicio, t.zona, t.ot_id,
  t.costo_total AS valor_observado,
  7 AS valor_esperado,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - t.fecha_factura) AS delta_pct,
  NULL AS zscore,
  CONCAT('OT ', t.ot_id, ' — ', EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - t.fecha_factura)::INT, ' días sin acta de cierre') AS narrativa_corta
FROM opex_transactions t
WHERE t.tiene_acta_cierre = false
  AND t.ot_id IS NOT NULL
  AND t.fecha_factura IS NOT NULL
  AND NOW() - t.fecha_factura > INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM opex_alerts a
    WHERE a.tx_id = t.id AND a.codigo_alerta = 'A7' AND a.estado != 'false_positive'
  )
LIMIT 50;

-- DETECTOR 3: Patrón sistemático — mismo contratista ≥3 alertas activas en mes (A11)
SELECT
  'A11' AS codigo_alerta, 'critica' AS severidad,
  NULL AS tx_id,
  a.contratista_id,
  MAX(a.contratista_nombre) AS contratista_nombre,
  NULL AS tipo_servicio,
  NULL AS zona, NULL AS ot_id,
  COUNT(*) AS valor_observado,
  3 AS valor_esperado,
  NULL AS zscore,
  ((COUNT(*) - 3.0) / 3.0 * 100) AS delta_pct,
  CONCAT('Contratista con ', COUNT(*), ' alertas activas en el mes — revisar contrato/tarifario') AS narrativa_corta
FROM opex_alerts a
WHERE a.estado IN ('open','ack','in_progress')
  AND a.generada_en >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND a.codigo_alerta NOT IN ('A11','A14')
GROUP BY a.contratista_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM opex_alerts x
    WHERE x.contratista_id = a.contratista_id
      AND x.codigo_alerta = 'A11'
      AND x.generada_en >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      AND x.estado != 'false_positive'
  );

-- DETECTOR 4: Fuga silenciosa de margen (A12)
-- Costo real agregado vs costo teórico (cantidad × tarifa vigente) por contratista/mes > 8%
WITH tx_con_tarifa AS (
  SELECT
    t.contratista_id,
    t.contratista_nombre,
    t.costo_total,
    t.cantidad,
    get_tarifa_vigente(
      t.contratista_id,
      t.item_codigo,
      COALESCE(NULLIF(t.or_nombre,''), 'OTROS_OR'),
      t.fecha_tx::DATE,
      'diurna'
    ) AS tarifa_vigente
  FROM opex_transactions t
  WHERE t.fecha_tx >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    AND t.cantidad IS NOT NULL AND t.cantidad > 0
    AND t.item_codigo IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  'A12' AS codigo_alerta, 'alta' AS severidad,
  NULL AS tx_id,
  ct.contratista_id,
  MAX(ct.contratista_nombre) AS contratista_nombre,
  NULL AS tipo_servicio,
  NULL AS zona,
  NULL AS ot_id,
  SUM(ct.costo_total) AS valor_observado,
  SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente) AS valor_esperado,
  NULL AS zscore,
  ROUND(
    ((SUM(ct.costo_total) - SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente)) / NULLIF(SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente), 0)) * 100,
    2
  ) AS delta_pct,
  CONCAT(
    'Fuga acumulada mes: $',
    TO_CHAR(SUM(ct.costo_total) - SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente), 'FM999,999,999'),
    ' vs costo teórico (',
    ROUND(((SUM(ct.costo_total) - SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente)) / NULLIF(SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente), 0)) * 100, 1),
    '% sobre tarifa)'
  ) AS narrativa_corta
FROM tx_con_tarifa ct
WHERE ct.tarifa_vigente IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ct.contratista_id
HAVING
  SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente) > 0
  AND ((SUM(ct.costo_total) - SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente)) / NULLIF(SUM(ct.cantidad * ct.tarifa_vigente), 0)) > 0.08
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM opex_alerts a
    WHERE a.contratista_id = ct.contratista_id
      AND a.codigo_alerta = 'A12'
      AND a.generada_en >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      AND a.estado != 'false_positive'
  );

meta.notes: Detectores paralelos: A6 duplicados, A7 sin soporte, A11 patrón sistemático, A12 fuga silenciosa (usa get_tarifa_vigente con item_codigo + or_nombre). Gemini clasifica causa raíz y reescribe narrativa. Notifica a Slack con HTTP Request → chat.postMessage (Header Auth account 12) y botones Aprobar/FP enrutados a WF-04.
